response:
Yes, both Tionne Watkins and Park So-yeon have been members of girl groups.

*   **Tionne Watkins** (known as T-Boz) is identified in the text as a member of the American girl group **TLC**, formed in 1990.
*   **Park So-yeon** (known as Soyeon) is identified in the text as a former member of the South Korean girl group **T-ara**.
